title: Ankit Kumar: StellarVaultt Green Belt Build
paragraphs: Ankit Kumar, known as @UnrealAnkit, brings a strong builder profile to the Stellar Journey track. He is based in Noida, studies CSE (Class of 2028) at IILM, and his bio reflects a hands-on journey across startup and product spaces: founder at Qfuss, former work at Sanity Gaming and AIPivot, and currently building DevDock AI.

For his Green Belt build, he created StellarVaultt, a live reward vault project where users connect their wallet and claim SRT tokens. The idea is simple but useful: make rewards transparent, reduce confusion, and let users clearly understand when they are eligible, pending, or successfully claimed.

On the implementation side, he built both the contract and app layers. The project uses a reward-token contract and a reward-vault contract, with the vault triggering token transfer through an inter-contract call. The app also handles one-time claim protection, claim status tracking, recent activity visibility, and wallet compatibility for tools like Freighter, Albedo, and xBull.

What stands out in his journey is not just the code, but the consistency. His public updates show both ambition and realism: community events, workshop collaboration, candid moments around rejection, and a steady "keep shipping" attitude. That makes this vlog story less about one project and more about how he is shaping his long-term builder path.
